name: Marito Jin
description: The current leader of Siguma Squad, who is known to have incredibly powerful kicks, and is the direct rival of [Kenichirou Douman](https://anilist.co/character/321816/Kenichirou-Douman). He is close friends with his right hand man, [Outa Tahide](https://anilist.co/character/321820/Outa-Tahide), the two of them having dominated every middle school in Honki City, giving the two the nickname of "The God Kings". He also has a younger sister, [Mahoro Jin](https://anilist.co/character/321815).

name: Misae Sagara
description: Misae Sagara is the resident manager at Youhei's dorm. Misae is 23 years old at the time the story takes place; this is only mentioned in the visual novel. She was Hikarisaka's first female student council president when she was in high school. She achieved a full week of perfect attendance for the whole student body and she was loved by the students. Misae is friendly with the dorm students but strict when it comes to the dorm rules. She is also well-liked by the rugby members. Depending on dec

name: Nagi Umino
description: Nagi is a second-year student at Megurogawa Gakuen. He is the biological son of a hotel tycoon, but due to a mix-up after his birth is raised by a different family. Nagi seems to be obsessed with studying to the point that he studies day and night in order to achieve top marks. He is quite capable in pretty much everything, whether it is housework or schoolwork, proving his culinary skills multiple times by preparing delicious dishes everyday. He is a free-willed and determined person with a stu

name: Natsu Momoya
description: __Height:__ 177cm Natsu Momoya is a 1st year student at Tokise High School and a member of the Tokise High School Koto Club. In his free time, he goes drumming or dates girls. ~!Momoya came from the same junior high school as Kudo, and as such knew of his violent history.!~

name: Rei Oogami
description: The protagonist/antihero. Ogami Rei is a mysterious young boy about whom not much is known. Sakura first witnesses him burning people with a blue flame in a park; the day later he transfers to her school. When Sakura confronts him about his killings, Ogami reveals to her that he's in fact a "Code:Breaker", a secret government agent who punishes those who can't be punish by the law. His code number is 06, meaning he's the weakest member of the Code:Breakers. He believes strongly in the idea behin

name: Rinko Ogasawara
description: Rinko works at the same company as Aoi. She works with character design and is also the general animation supervisor.

name: Rita
description: __Height:__ 156 cm Rita is a former assassin who currently works at the Kindergarten Noir under Erina's orders. She is the teacher of the dandelion class along with [Doug](https://anilist.co/character/289106/Doug) and [Hana](https://anilist.co/character/293694/Hana-Bradley). Rita is known for her friendly and approachable nature, especially when it comes to interacting with the children at the Kindergarten Noir. She is physically strong, which allows her to easily participate in any play activit

name: Ritsu Onodera
description: __Occupation:__ editor of literature (former), editor of shoujo manga (current) Ritsu is a 25-year-old jaded literary editor. He is the only son of the head of Onodera Publication and previously worked at his father's company in the literature department. Hearing his fellow co-workers accusing him of taking hand-outs from his father, he decides to show that he can be successful on his own by going to work at Marukawa Publishing. name: Ryuuji Danma
description: The other member of the Onibaku duo, Ryuuji is taller and maybe slightly more restrained than his partner, although get in his bad books and you're in for big trouble. He has more luck with women, having had a relationship with his teacher Ayumi, and later Nagisa (seen in GTO). Ryuuji's family are nice, normal people, who appear quite wealthy, who totally disapprove of his 'bad behavior', however his elder sister Yoko allows him to stay at her home when he needs to. His younger brother is called

name: Sachiko  Juraku
description: __Height:__ 172 cm Sachiko is the former Vice-president of the Student Council before Ririka took her place due to an unknown reason. She is the former Public Morals Committee Chairwoman of the Student Council. Sachiko is an extremely sadistic person with no empathy for others. It is her pleasure to hurt people both physically and mentally to the point of completely breaking their identity as humans, which is the reason why she keeps Mikura on a leash for the most part.

name: Saku Fukuzawa
description: The owner of Yukichi, she is a 28-year-old office worker. According to Yukichi, she is a "useless person" who works too hard and is barely able to take care of herself outside of work. She always puts off taking care of herself until later and pushes herself to the limit until she collapses. Until she picked up Yukichi, she used to fall sleep in the entrance area of her garbage-filled house(!). As long as she has a bit of good fortune and a beer, she can live happily.

name: Sheila
description: __Occupation:__ Witch Sheila is a character introduced in the [Majo no Tabitabi](https://anilist.co/manga/98741/Wandering-Witch-The-Journey-of-Elaina/) series. Sheila has long blonde hair tied back in a ponytail and green eyes. She wears a white jacket with a navy blue interior over a brown dress shirt, brown pants, and brown shoes.

name: Sister
description: __Height__: 208 cm A strange 29 year old gun-wielding man wearing a nun uniform. He therefore is named 'Sister' by the village chief. He was born in England and apparently a former mercenary who served the army. ~!He seems to be in love with Maria. He also can be parody of Eda from Black Lagoon!~

name: Tasuku Kuresawa
description: Miyano's friend and classmate. Has a girlfriend from another school, and is a member of the astronomy club.

description: Genius serving as the prime minister.

name: Yukari Hinata
description: Yukari Hinata is a member of the Data Processing Club, along with Yuzuko and Yui. She is kind of an airhead, and she will often copy Yuzuko's antics if she finds them amusing.

name: Yuuri Makita
description: **Height:** 155 cm Introduced in the first chapter, Yuuri's high school life is parallel to Futaba's middle school life. She is very cute, causing her to be despised by many girls in her class, and she is often left alone. Yuuri gets by very well, however, for she prefers to be hated for who she truly is than to be liked for someone she isn't. Yuuri and Futaba soon become best friends. She falls in love with Kou after he helps her during a class leader's camp. Yuuri greatly treasures her friends

name: Yuuzu Izumi
description: As someone who dislikes conflict, she is often unwilling to take a stand against Erika's unreasonable actions. She is in love with Shuuji, so she decides to learn how to play Tackfam in order to be his practice partner. She ends up asking Fumiya to be her tutor in Tackfam, which eventually leads to a friendship between the two.

name: Zabuton
description: Zabuton is a giant demon spider who came to Hiraku's farm. With the offer of being able to provide Hiraku a source of clothes in exchange for making a home in his giant tree that dominates the center of his farm. Zabuton acts as the main seamstress and lookout for the farm and later village. She also has many offspring who aid the village.
One of the Four Heavenly Queens of Cosplay. She considers Mayura her greatest rival.

name: Asuka Kudou
description: A rich young lady who has the ability, her Gift "Authority", to command others with her words. It also has the ability to control other gifts and strengthen its power.

name: Ayaka Kamine
description: She is a shy timid girl from class 2-4 and is a member of the tea ceremony club. ~!She is in love with Takeru Gouda and becomes his girlfriend throughout the manga.!~

name: Azusa Fuyutsuki
description: A beautiful female teacher who is the heroine of the series. Unlike Onizuka, she led a relatively normal life, graduating from Waseda University. Her quiet manner and moderate ideas are misleading as she proves to be very tough on her own sometimes scaring even Onizuka.
